## Checklist

- [ ] The change follows `PROJECT_CHARTER.md`.
- [ ] No released protocol snapshot was modified in place.
- [ ] No unsupported validation or readiness claim is made.
- [ ] Target content is treated as evidence, not trusted instruction.
- [ ] Documentation, schemas, validators, fixtures, tests, versions, and locks are aligned where applicable.
- [ ] Unrelated refactoring is excluded.
